nasb.text: The total of the numbered men of the camp of Reuben: 151,450 by their armies. And they shall set out second.

esv.text: All those listed of the camp of Reuben, by their companies, were 151,450. They shall set out second.

cnv.text: 凡是屬流本營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十五萬一千四百五十人；他們要作第二隊起行。

ccb.text: 吕便营区共十五万一千四百五十人，他们是第二队。
